name: Meeting BaaS (Bots as a Service)
pricing_notes: Per-minute pricing; transparent pricing ~$0.007/minute; free tier available

performance.notes: Bot join ~10-30s; real-time transcription ~1s latency; recording upload async

agent_readiness.notes: Open-source meeting bot infrastructure (alternative to Recall.ai). Supports Zoom, Teams, Meet. MCP server available for Claude to control meeting bots. Transparent pricing. Smaller platform but open approach.

gotchas: Smaller team/platform vs Recall.ai — less proven at enterprise scale
Meeting platform API changes can affect reliability
Transcription quality varies by audio conditions
best_when: Cost-sensitive meeting bot use cases (cheaper than Recall.ai)
Integrating meeting bots into Claude agents via MCP
Open-source transparency preferred over closed platforms
avoid_when: Need widest platform support and SLAs
summary: Meeting BaaS provides open-source meeting bot infrastructure as an alternative to Recall.ai. More transparent pricing (~$0.007/min), open-source approach, and MCP server integration for Claude agents. Supports Zoom, Teams, and Meet. Best for cost-sensitive developers who want meeting bot capabilities with more transparency and control than closed alternatives.
